name: Bread Bowls
recipeIngredient: Approximately 2-3 cups additional all-purpose and wheat flour
Additional 1 1/2 - 2 cups of all-purpose and wheat flour for kneading
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water.
2. Add 1 cup each of all-purpose and wheat flour, mixing until smooth.
3. Gradually add more flour (alternating between all-purpose and wheat), mixing until very stiff.
4. Turn dough onto a floured board and knead until smooth and non-sticky (add another 1 1/2 - 2 cups of flour as needed).
5. Form the dough into a ball, place in an oiled bowl, and cover. Let rise for 1-1.5 hours or until doubled.
6. Punch down the dough and let rest for 10 minutes.
7. Divide into 4-6 smaller balls and shape on cookie sheets as disks. Cover and let rise for another hour.
8. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Remove from oven and allow to cool.
9. Cut a circle out of the top of each loaf, removing the crust.
10. Smush down the inner part of the bread bowl. Optionally brush with egg white before cooking.
11. Cook at 375°F for 40-50 minutes, until hollow when thumped.
